name: permanent Nawat rail shell
maintenance_note: Owns #conversion-rail-block and #calc-guidance.

name: desktop rail grid slot
maintenance_note: Places rail under Entrada right of Derivada and above Salida.

name: patientivo tronco candidate yard
maintenance_note: Collects stripped stems before rendering conversion rail.

name: ordinary Nawat movement
maintenance_note: Entrada to optional derivation to selected tense.

name: patientivo branch movement
maintenance_note: Entrada to S patientivo selected branch.

name: patientivo tronco conversion approach
maintenance_note: Visible only when activePatientivoBranch is tronco-verbal.

name: active conversion route
maintenance_note: Clickable surface trail from source through branch/stem/conversion to finite output.

name: -ti preterit
maintenance_note: denominal-vi-ti-preterit to -tik.

name: -ti perfect
maintenance_note: denominal-vi-ti-perfect to -tituk.

name: -na preterit
maintenance_note: denominal-vt-na-preterit to -naj.

name: -na perfect
maintenance_note: denominal-vt-na-perfect to -najtuk.

name: Entrada/source chip
maintenance_note: Click opens input panel.

name: derivation stop
maintenance_note: Click opens derivation panel.

name: destination tense
maintenance_note: Click opens output panel.

name: S patientivo branch selector
maintenance_note: Dropdown station for four patientivo substations.

name: pasivo/impersonal substation
maintenance_note: Uses nonactive source scope.

name: perfectivo substation
maintenance_note: Uses active source scope.

name: imperfectivo substation
maintenance_note: Uses active source scope.

name: tronco verbal substation
maintenance_note: Exposes conversion switch when eligible stems exist.

name: stem station
maintenance_note: Exposes stripped patientivo stem such as pusuk.

name: verbalized input station
maintenance_note: Shows verbalized input such as (pusuk)-(na).

name: finite surface station
maintenance_note: Shows final output such as pusuknajtuk.

name: patientivo branch switch
maintenance_note: Changes branch state and rerenders patientivo.

name: conversion fast-track switch
maintenance_note: Activates one of four denominal verb routes.

name: active station navigation
maintenance_note: Moves forward/back along active breadcrumb stations.

name: V/S mode marker
maintenance_note: Preserves verb/noun identity inside rail chips.

name: active patientivo branch state
maintenance_note: Declared route-state signal defaults to tronco-verbal.

name: active chip styling
maintenance_note: Highlights selected breadcrumb chip.

name: patientivo focus styling
maintenance_note: Temporarily highlights selected branch output block.

name: candidate admission boundary
maintenance_note: Strips absolutive suffix and checks intermediary consonant.

name: legacy generation boundary
maintenance_note: Visible Nawat route still uses legacy metadata internally.

name: particle unbuilt boundary
maintenance_note: Particle mode exists but no current breadcrumb route is built.

name: European adjective scope boundary
maintenance_note: Current Nawat tracks cover four of nine European-convention adjective circuits only.
